name: What should I do if AI tools are already giving wrong information about my company or services?

mainEntity.name: What should I do if AI tools are already giving wrong information about my company or services?

acceptedAnswer.text:
If AI answers about your brand are wrong or outdated, you need to **fix both your own content and the external sources AI relies on**.

Simply updating one page rarely changes entrenched misconceptions by itself.

Key factors:
- Identify which sites or documents AI is citing in incorrect answers
- Update your website with clear, prominent corrections and explanations
- Reach out to third-party platforms to update or clarify old information
- Add structured data and FAQs addressing the specific misconceptions

Track key prompts over time and adjust your content until AI answers shift toward the corrected narrative.

You’re essentially running a reputation and facts alignment project across both owned and external content.
acceptedAnswer.description: Audit the prompts and sources behind those answers, then update your own site with clear, prominent corrections and supporting schema. Where AI is citing third-party pages, work to update or clarify those as well. Monitor the same prompts over time until the AI responses reflect your corrected information.
